case_title: STUART W. PENFIELD et al VS. JACK ROBBINS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS. F. RAYRAY
JUDGEMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS, RETURNED. SIGNED BY ONLY ONE CREDITOR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENFIELD, STUART W. PENFIELD, JASON E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBBINS, JACK $602.29 PRINCIPAL, $9.54 INTEREST, $82.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $694.33, ONE MONTH CREDIT FOR GARBAGE, BALANCE IS A CREDIT AGAINST PAINTING CHARGE FOR THOSE AREAS OF THE PROPERTY NOT IMPACTED BY SCUFF MARKS. PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE NOT WARRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROBBINS, JACK
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $694.33 FOR TRANSACTION W0608313D003 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO STUART & JASON PENFIELD, DOC 1901139019, WARRANT #38001824, DATED APR-23-2008
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,765.00 FILED BY PENFIELD, STUART W. PENFIELD, JASON E. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBBINS, JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBBINS, JACK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACK ROBBINS WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT ROBBINS, JACK
JUDGEMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS RETURNED. ONLY STUART PENFIELD SIGNED.
JUDGEMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS, FILED. COPY WAS GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING.
